summary: The diff modifies useImageLoader.ts with improved retry logic, stale-load prevention, and fallback placeholder behavior. However, several acceptance criteria reference components (LoadingTimeout, SwipeableGallery, AttackOnTitanGallery, WatchProductSection, MeeshoProductSection, ProductBrowse) that are not modified in the diff. The frontend-file-summaries.txt mentions relevant components exist and have loading states, but no actual code changes to those files are shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: LoadingTimeout component does not prematurely trigger the timeout alert under normal conditions
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not include any changes to frontend/src/components/LoadingTimeout.tsx. No fix is applied to it.

missing_requirements.requirement: Images in SwipeableGallery, AttackOnTitanGallery, WatchProductSection, and MeeshoProductSection load correctly
missing_requirements.reason: None of these component files appear in the modified files list. Only useImageLoader.ts was changed.

missing_requirements.requirement: The ProductBrowse page loads all sections without displaying a stuck loading spinner
missing_requirements.reason: frontend/src/pages/ProductBrowse.tsx is not in the list of modified files. No changes to the page itself are present in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: No indefinite loading states remain visible after content has been fetched
missing_requirements.reason: Without changes to ProductBrowse.tsx, LoadingTimeout.tsx, or the gallery/section components, indefinite loading states in those components cannot be confirmed as fixed.
